name: Irish Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: All-Bran™ cereal, oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and caraway seeds.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the wet ingredients: sugar, vegetable oil, and buttermilk.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Grease a pie or cake tin with additional vegetable oil.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared tin.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45-60 minutes, or until golden brown.
Note: Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
